Vancouver Decorative Walls

Venetian Plaster & Feature Walls in Vancouver

Stile di Leo creates premium Venetian plaster walls, fireplace feature walls, and custom decorative finishes across Vancouver, West Vancouver, North Vancouver, Surrey, and the Lower Mainland.

Our Story

Rooted in Craft,
Built on Artistry

At Stile di Leo, we transform walls into timeless works of art. Inspired by the elegance of Venetian plaster, natural stone, and modern design, every surface becomes a reflection of luxury and intention.

We specialize in custom decorative walls, mineral-based plaster finishes, and handcrafted stone textures — bringing depth and soul into every space across Vancouver and BC.

Our Finishes

Textures & Materials

Warm Venetian
Classic Italian plaster with warm golden undertones
Silver Metallic
Reflective metallic finish with cool silver tones
Grey Stone
Natural stone-inspired texture with depth and character
Pearl White
Delicate pearl-white finish with subtle shimmer
Graphite Metallic
Dark sophisticated metallic with stormy depth
Cream Gold
Soft cream with fine gold veining — timeless luxury

What We Do

Our Specialties

01
Venetian Plaster
Classic Italian technique with marble dust and lime — luminous, depth-rich walls.
02
Stone & Marble
Hand-sculpted stone and marble finishes for fireplaces, feature walls and columns.
03
Metallic Finishes
Gold, silver and copper metallic plasters — couture-level finishes for luxury spaces.

How We Work

From Concept to Completion

A
Consultation & Vision
We start with an in-depth conversation to understand your aesthetic goals, the space, and the atmosphere you wish to create.
B
Sample & Selection
We craft handmade samples on-site so you see and feel the exact finish, colour and texture before any commitment.
C
Craftsmanship
Every coat is applied by hand with precision. We work clean, on schedule, and with deep respect for your space.
D
Reveal & Guarantee
A final walkthrough together ensures every detail is perfect. All work is backed by our quality guarantee.
